channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Freezing hikers stuck in waist-deep snow rescued during Mount Washington whiteout
item.description: Two experienced hikers were rescued after an hourslong ordeal in which they became stranded in waist-deep snow and whiteout conditions on New Hampshire's challenging Mount Washington.
item.dc:creator: Kathy Mccormack And Michael Casey, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Temple University police say 2 students, 1 former student impersonated ICE agents on campus
item.description: Two current students and one former student at Temple University were identified by campus police after allegedly impersonating U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump signs executive order intended to bar transgender athletes from girls' and women's sports
item.description: President Donald Trump signed an executive order on Wednesday intended to ban transgender athletes from participating in girls' and women’s sports.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Police seek motive after a suspect was arrested for a fatal shooting at an Ohio cosmetics warehouse
item.description: NEW ALBANY, Ohio (AP) — A man accused of shooting to death a coworker and wounding five others at an Ohio warehouse has spoken with police as they probe for a motive, authorities said Wednesday, hours after he was arrested in an apartment.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Discount store chain closing all locations across 10 states
item.description: Nashville-based Bargain Hunt announced Wednesday that it has initiated "going out of business" sales at all of its stores.
item.dc:creator: Carlos Mathis, NewsNation

item.title: Video: 2 men facing charges after Albuquerque courtroom brawl
item.description: Video of the encounter, some of which can be seen in the video player above, shows the defendant standing in front of the judge when a man appears to jump over the partition and run forward.
item.dc:creator: Chandler Farnsworth, NewsNation

item.title: Japan Airlines plane clips Delta flight at Sea-Tac airport
item.description: A plane at Seattle-Tacoma International Airport hit another aircraft that was taxiing on the runway Wednesday morning, the Federal Aviation Administration has confirmed.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senate confirms Scott Turner to lead HUD
item.description: The Senate on Wednesday confirmed Scott Turner to lead the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD), cementing another one of President Trump’s Cabinet choices. Senators voted 55-44 on Turner’s nomination. Sens. John Fetterman (D-Pa.) and Peter Welch (D-Vt.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Racial gap widened in deaths among US moms around the time of childbirth
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Black women in the U.S. died at a rate nearly 3.5 times higher than white women around the time of childbirth in 2023, as maternal mortality fell below prepandemic levels overall but racial gaps widened, according to federal health data released Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE STOBBE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Storm threatens significant ice accumulations in several mid-Atlantic states, forecasters say
item.description: CHARLESTON, W.Va. (AP) — A winter storm approaching several mid-Atlantic states is threatening significant ice accumulations that could cause widespread power outages and disrupt travel, forecasters warned Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Armed teen arrested at Arkansas airport after allegedly demanding plane
item.description: After the employees got to safety, the suspect "breached through a door onto the airfield," an airport official said.
item.dc:creator: Hunter Trombetta, NewsNation

item.title: Flight attendant killed in midair collision near D.C. honored with service
item.description: A flight attendant who was killed in the midair collision last week near the nation’s capital was remembered for his devotion to family and passion for travel.
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Collins And Erik Verduzco, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Oklahoma board denies clemency for man on death row, clears path for March execution
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — An Oklahoma board rejected clemency on Wednesday for a man sentenced to die for fatally shooting a woman during a 2005 home-invasion robbery, clearing the way for him to become the first person executed in the state this year.
item.dc:creator: SEAN MURPHY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Bondi sworn in as attorney general in Oval Office
item.description: Pam Bondi was sworn in as attorney general on Wednesday in the Oval Office with President Trump looking on and telling reporters she would be “as impartial as a person can be." “I know I'm supposed to say, ‘She's going to be totally impartial with respect to Democrats.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Suspect arrested after shooting at Ohio cosmetics facility leaves 1 dead, 5 injured
item.description: Officials announced that Foster had been arrested by U.S. Marshalls after a manhunt that stretched through the night.
item.dc:creator: Brett Mills, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Armed teen arrested at Arkansas airport after allegedly demanding plane
item.description: After the employees got to safety, the suspect "breached through a door onto the airfield," an airport official said.
item.dc:creator: Hunter Trombetta, Fox 5

item.title: US allies, adversaries reject Trump suggestion to 'take over' Gaza Strip
item.description: Both U.S. allies and adversaries alike rejected President Donald Trump’s suggestion that the U.S. “take over” the war-torn Gaza Strip and turn it into the “Riviera of the Middle East.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KRON4

item.title: A Texas man is executed for the killing of a pastor during a robbery at a church
item.description: A Texas man has been executed for the killing of a Dallas area pastor who was attacked in his church during a robbery.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vertuno And Michael Graczyk, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mmm, that looks yummy! The colors we see make a difference in the food we eat
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — You know you've said it. We all have. “Mmm, that looks so delicious — I want to try some!” That's because when it comes to what we eat, it's not just a matter of taste.
item.dc:creator: DEEPTI HAJELA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: USAID direct hires put on leave worldwide, except those deemed essential
item.description: The Trump administration is placing U.S. Agency for International Development direct-hire staffers around the world on leave, except those deemed essential.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump floats US taking over Gaza Strip
item.description: President Trump on Tuesday floated the idea of the U.S. taking over the Gaza Strip, saying America should be responsible for clearing the territory of rubble and unexploded bombs and proposing an “economic development.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, WGN 9

item.title: Remains of all 67 victims in deadly DC plane and chopper collision now recovered
item.description: The chief medical examiner is still trying to positively identify one set of remains, officials said in a news release.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump to sign executive order banning transgender athletes from women’s sports
item.description: President Donald Trump is expected to sign an executive order Wednesday banning transgender athletes from competing in girls’ and women’s sports, the latest in a string of executive actions from the new administration to take aim at LGBTQ rights.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, KRON4

item.title: What did US get from deals to pause tariffs on Canada and Mexico? Not that much, observers say
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump’s threatened tariffs against Canada and Mexico — now on hold for a month — risked blowing up North America’s economy.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, MARÍA VERZA and ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Biden signs with powerful Hollywood agency
item.description: Is former President Joe Biden Hollywood's next leading man? The 46th president has signed with behemoth talent firm Creative Artists Agency to handle his professional life after leaving office, the agency announced.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Michael Jordan's son, Marcus, arrested after allegedly fleeing Florida police: reports
item.description: Marcus Jordan reportedly got his car stuck on some railroad tracks after allegedly fleeing a traffic stop.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, KRON4

item.title: Waffle House adding surcharge for every egg ordered
item.description: Waffle House restaurants across the nation added a 50-cent surcharge to every egg ordered amid soaring prices due to inflation and the bird flu epidemic.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Major League Baseball fires ump amid gambling probe
item.description: Umpire Pat Hoberg was fired after it was revealed he shared betting accounts with a friend who bet on baseball.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5

item.title: Salvage crews remove large portion of commercial jet from river after deadly air collision near DC
item.description: Salvage crews have removed a large portion of a commercial jet from the Potomac River near Washington’s Reagan National Airport on Monday, five days after a midair collision last week that killed 67 people.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Live updates: Trump suggests Gaza should 'not be rebuilt' in joint presser with Netanyahu
item.description: President Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu are holding a joint press conference at the White House on Tuesday where they are discussing the future of the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: The Hill staff, ABC 4

item.title: Struggling with your mental health after surviving a disaster? Here's how to look after yourself
item.description: There’s the initial shock and chaos in a collective disaster like the deadly and destructive California wildfires.
item.dc:creator: MARIAM FAM, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s nomination to be health secretary advances in divided Senate committee vote
item.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the controversial environmental lawyer turned public health critic, is set to find out on Tuesday if he has cleared the first hurdle to become the nation’s top health official when the Senate Finance Committee votes on his nomination.
item.dc:creator: AMANDA SEITZ and STEPHEN GROVES Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Gerber recalls all batches of Soothe N Chew Teething Sticks nationwide
item.description: Gerber Products Company has announced a nationwide recall and discontinuation of all batches of its Soothe N Chew Teething Sticks due to a potential choking hazard for infants and young children.
item.dc:creator: Reagan Wynn, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump agrees to pause tariffs on Canada and Mexico after they pledge to boost border enforcement
item.description: President Donald Trump on Monday agreed to a 30-day pause on his tariff threats against Mexico and Canada as America's two largest trading partners took steps to appease his concerns about border security and drug trafficking.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, ROB GILLIES and FABIOLA SÁNCHEZ Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New York shields abortion pill prescribers after a doctor was indicted in Louisiana
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — New York Gov. Kathy Hochul on Monday signed a bill to shield the identities of doctors who prescribe abortion medications, days after a physician in the state was charged with prescribing abortion pills to a pregnant minor in Louisiana.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: USAID leaders escorted out of building after blocking DOGE access to secure systems
item.description: Officials said USAID members were eventually unsuccessful and DOGE teams were able to gain access to some of the agency’s classified information, including intelligence reports.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, WFLA, NBC

item.title: EU warns Trump it would ‘respond firmly’ to tariffs
item.description: “The EU would respond firmly to any trading partner that unfairly or arbitrarily imposes tariffs on EU goods,” a spokesperson said. “There is a lot at stake.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, WGN 9
